title: dendranthema yoshinaganthum
intro: Dendranthema yoshinaganthum, also known as Chrysanthemum yoshinaganthum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antipyretic effects, derived from its bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and sesquiterpenes. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and promoting digestive health. Dendranthema yoshinaganthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to harness its medicinal properties.
